actualStart.description: The actual start time of the call in ISO-8601 format.

clientUniqueId.description: A unique identifier for the call provided by the client to prevent duplicates.

downloadMediaUrl.description: Optional URL from which Gong can download the call recording media. If not provided, use /v2/calls/{id}/media to upload.

duration.description: Duration of the call in seconds.

languageCode.description: Language code of the call for transcription.

primaryUser.description: Email address of the primary Gong user on the call.

purpose.description: The purpose or subject of the call.

scheduledEnd.description: The scheduled end time of the call.

scheduledStart.description: The scheduled start time of the call.

workspaceId.description: The workspace to associate the call with.
